summary: WIN-038 tldr_evidence appended with the transverse-mode preemptive-defense clause: 'No transverse-mode retreat rescues it — the only horizontal-length setter that gives 7.83 Hz is Earth's circumference, which the dome's disc diameter equals by construction.' Flags the EXP-198 preempt move in the TLDR so a defender skimming can't pivot to the TM-cavity-mode escape without realising the full argument is in the detail_evidence below. Patch PATCH-304-B in EXP-304.
